name: CoreWeave / CoreWeave AI 云
sector: AI cloud infrastructure / AI 云基础设施
summary: CoreWeave 是专注 GPU 云的上市公司，业务与 NVIDIA GPU 供给、数据中心融资和 AI 客户需求高度相关；公司仍处于高增长与高资本开支阶段。 / CoreWeave is a public GPU-cloud company with high exposure to NVIDIA GPU supply, data-center financing, and AI customer demand, while still in a high-growth, high-capex phase.
summaryZh: CoreWeave 是专注 GPU 云的上市公司，业务与 NVIDIA GPU 供给、数据中心融资和 AI 客户需求高度相关；公司仍处于高增长与高资本开支阶段。
summaryEn: CoreWeave is a public GPU-cloud company with high exposure to NVIDIA GPU supply, data-center financing, and AI customer demand, while still in a high-growth, high-capex phase.

business.description: 公司向 AI 实验室、企业和开发者提供 GPU 云、托管 Kubernetes、存储和网络基础设施。 / The company provides GPU cloud, managed Kubernetes, storage, and networking infrastructure to AI labs, enterprises, and developers.
business.descriptionZh: 公司向 AI 实验室、企业和开发者提供 GPU 云、托管 Kubernetes、存储和网络基础设施。
business.descriptionEn: The company provides GPU cloud, managed Kubernetes, storage, and networking infrastructure to AI labs, enterprises, and developers.
revenueModel: GPU 云实例 / GPU cloud instances
托管 AI 基础设施 / managed AI infrastructure
存储和网络 / storage and networking

business.thesis: NVIDIA 相关性最直接：CoreWeave 的云服务能力高度依赖 NVIDIA GPU 采购、部署和融资能力。 / The NVIDIA linkage is direct: CoreWeave's cloud-service capacity depends heavily on NVIDIA GPU procurement, deployment, and financing capacity.
business.thesisZh: NVIDIA 相关性最直接：CoreWeave 的云服务能力高度依赖 NVIDIA GPU 采购、部署和融资能力。
business.thesisEn: The NVIDIA linkage is direct: CoreWeave's cloud-service capacity depends heavily on NVIDIA GPU procurement, deployment, and financing capacity.
riskNotes: 公司仍有亏损和高杠杆/高资本开支特征。 / The company still has losses and high leverage/capex characteristics.
客户集中、GPU 供应和数据中心电力制约会放大波动。 / Customer concentration, GPU supply, and data-center power constraints can amplify volatility.

supplyChain.thesis: NVIDIA 相关性最直接：CoreWeave 的云服务能力高度依赖 NVIDIA GPU 采购、部署和融资能力。 / The NVIDIA linkage is direct: CoreWeave's cloud-service capacity depends heavily on NVIDIA GPU procurement, deployment, and financing capacity.
supplyChain.thesisZh: NVIDIA 相关性最直接：CoreWeave 的云服务能力高度依赖 NVIDIA GPU 采购、部署和融资能力。
supplyChain.thesisEn: The NVIDIA linkage is direct: CoreWeave's cloud-service capacity depends heavily on NVIDIA GPU procurement, deployment, and financing capacity.
